product_name: VA Imaging 2MP 10x AutoFocus Zoom MIPI Camera for Raspberry Pi
stabilization_notes: Digital Image Stabilization listed as a feature.
video_output_interfaces: MIPI CSI-2 (direct Raspberry Pi connection, recognized as native Pi camera)
price_source: Contact VA Imaging directly or check https://va-imaging.com; also available via GeT Cameras (EU distributor)
availability: In production, orderable online from VA Imaging website
notable_features: Direct MIPI CSI-2 connection to Raspberry Pi (no USB or HDMI adapter needed)
Recognized as native Raspberry Pi camera module by OS
Includes HAT board for power and I2C command interface
2.95um pixel size - approximately 9x more light sensitive than 8MP Pi camera
Real-time True WDR with High Light Compensation
Controllable zoom and focus from Raspberry Pi software
Also compatible with NVIDIA Jetson platforms (via e-con Systems FarVis22 variant)

_data_confidence.notes: VA Imaging publishes functional specifications prominently but physical specs (weight, dimensions, power) and pricing are not readily available in public search results. The product page likely shows pricing when visited directly (WebFetch was denied). Weight is described as 'low' but no specific gram value was found. The camera is noted to be compact but exact dimensions were not published in search-accessible sources.
